name: Temapol Polimer Plastik ve Insaat Sanayi Ticaret A.S.
summary: Temapol Polimer Plastik ve Insaat Sanayi Ticaret A.S. manufactures and sells thermoplastic sheets in Turkey and internationally. The company's products are used in furniture, sanitary ware, automotive and vehicle, white goods and cooling, advertisement, and medical and sanitary industries. It also offers temaglass and high gloss acrylic sheets. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Kayseri, Turkey.
